title: n8n 2.0 is Here (What You Need to Know)

extracted.hook: NN version 2 is finally here and I've spent multiple hours comparing version one with version two.
transitions: So let's not waste any time and get straight into the video.
Now, one thing to keep in mind on the lefth hand side I'm on edit and cloud and on the right hand side I'm on my self-hosted version with Hostinger.
But anyways, you guys have probably been seeing when you go into your end, you have this little bar at the top that says get ready for V2, learn more.
extracted.cta: "I hope you guys enjoyed or you learned something new. If you did, please give it a like. It definitely helps me out a ton."
extracted.analogies: "So, in this new version, when you hover over the connectors, they kind of like pop out and they're just kind of white outlined"
extracted.vulnerability: "I'm really glad that the majority of the actual foundation of how anin works is pretty much the exact same"

pace_accelerates: When discussing new features and changes between versions
pace_slows: During detailed explanations of specific UI elements
